evals.prompt: I dropped an x.com link in this prompt. Read the post text with the official X API and tell me what it says without asking me to paste the token here.
evals.expected_output: Uses the x-link-reader CLI workflow, checks local auth if needed, and fetches the text without requesting secrets in-prompt.

evals.prompt: Please read this X article link and give me the exact article text first, then a short summary.
evals.expected_output: Uses the official lookup endpoint with article-aware extraction and returns article text before summarizing.

evals.prompt: Can you inspect this Twitter status URL, extract the post ID, and fetch the full long-form text if it's a note tweet?
evals.expected_output: Parses the URL, calls the lookup endpoint with note_tweet requested, and prefers full long-form text over the truncated display text.
